q3: The organization-as-hero framing kept creeping back in — I had to explicitly flag the 'we' problem before it registered, and even then I had to watch for it in subsequent drafts. The donor framing also took multiple rounds to get right; it defaulted to gratitude language instead of the strategic-collaborator register I actually want. Once I named those things directly, it responded well, but I shouldn't have had to spell them out so explicitly.
